title: Rich Yeasty Egyptian Wheat Pancakes
description: A delicious and creamy Egyptian dish featuring maple syrup, perfect for a brunch mood, with a yeasty twist and high protein content.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Egyptian wheat flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt, maple syrup, and eggs.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with melted butter and a drizzle of maple syrup.
Fold the pancakes in half or roll them up to serve.
